description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperPlush two tone leather straps over the forefoot, midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in placeVelcro closures for the fore foot and the midfootNubuck footbedPull loopOutsoleTPR outsole with multidirectional lugs and a curved midfootSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
